steps.title: Use the attendance dates
steps.content: The notes say Otto Richter began attending the Bauhaus in 1920, while Clara Weiss began in 1931. To emphasize order, the sentence must show that Richter attended before Weiss.

steps.title: Rule out choices that miss order
steps.content: A mentions both students without chronology. B gives only Weiss's date. D focuses on directors rather than the two students. The choice that states Richter preceded Weiss fits the goal. The answer is C.
